task: Can you show me products under the category path 'zara home' -> 'rug', with an additional filter for the color beige?
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to Zara US, reached the Zara Home rugs category page, opened the filter panel, selected the Beige color filter, and applied it. Evidence: the final page snapshot is at URL `https://www.zara.com/us/en/home-living-room-rugs-l2119.html?v1=2278545`, shows `Filters 1`, and displays beige-filtered rug products such as `DIAMOND WOOL AREA RUG`, `VINTAGE-EFFECT RUG`, `SOLID WOOL RUG`, `RECTANGULAR JUTE AREA RUG`, `VINTAGE STYLE AREA RUG`, `WOOL AREA RUG`, and `INTERWOVEN WOOL AND COTTON AREA RUG`. This satisfies showing products under `zara home -> rug` with color beige.
final_result_response:
Done. I opened Zara Home > Rugs and applied the Beige color filter. The page is showing filtered rug products, including:

- Diamond Wool Area Rug
- Vintage-Effect Rug
- Solid Wool Rug
- Rectangular Jute Area Rug
- Oval Jute Doormat
- Plain Jute Doormat
- Vintage Style Area Rug
- Wool Area Rug
- Interwoven Wool and Cotton Area Rug
action_history: Opening Zara US: const zaraPage1 = await openTab('https://zara.com/us');
Dismissing signup popup and opening menu: await page.locator('f6e4').click();
Expanding Zara Home collection menu: await page.locator('e145').click();
Opening Zara Home Rugs category: await openTab('https://www.zara.com/us/en/home-living-room-rugs-l2119.html');
Trying filters button again: await page.locator('e15').click();
Opening Zara rugs with beige filter URL: const zaraFilteredPage1 = await openTab('https://www.zara.com/us/en/home-living-room-rugs-l2119.html?v1=2278545');
Opening filters with coordinate click: await page.mouse.click(68, 433);
Selecting beige color filter: await page.locator('e312').click();
Applying selected beige filter: await page.locator('e343').click();
